subcodes.first_line: O Most Merciful, Most Compassionate, Most Generous! The East and the West are illumined by the effulgent rays of His Beauty, and the senses of the spiritually-minded inhale the fragrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رحمانا رحیما کریما شرق و غرب از انوار مشرق جمال منور است و مشام روحانیان از
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for healing, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for protection, @prayer for prosperity
